summary: Installer finalization now renders truthful reuse, refresh, and manual-fallback pairing outcomes, and the shared TUI wait path releases stdin so the interactive installer can close cleanly after the final summary.

checks.name: pairing-finalization-branches
checks.detail: Fresh runtime coverage proves existing-host refresh, existing-host reuse, request-failed fallback, and probe-unavailable fallback all render the expected finalization items without the stale placeholder manual guidance.

checks.name: final-summary-exit
checks.detail: `readKeypress()` now resumes stdin before capture and pauses stdin during cleanup, while unit and interactive runtime tests confirm `ENTER close` resolves and leaves stdin paused with no lingering keypress listener.

checks.name: fresh-verification
checks.detail: `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap run build`, `typecheck`, `lint`, the targeted CLI/runtime/TUI regression commands, and `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap run test` all passed and are recorded in the raw evidence bundle.

checks.name: proof-bundle-completeness
checks.detail: The task bundle now includes spec.md, evidence.md, evidence.json, problems.md, task.json, verdict.json, and raw verification artifacts, with task metadata set to phase complete and verification passed.

checks.name: cli-wrapper-coverage
checks.detail: `executeHappyTG` now has a dedicated regression proving the CLI install wrapper delegates to the installer without changing the install result contract or `tuiHandled` behavior.

residualRisks: No proof run exercised the exact operator environment with a live Telegram/API backend and a real console, so final confidence still comes from deterministic CLI/runtime/TUI coverage rather than an end-to-end live install reproduction.
